info.name: FashionStore API - Full Lifecycle
info.description: Runs a full lifecycle smoke test against every FashionStore endpoint. It creates disposable records with a unique run id and deletes only those records.

exec: pm.test('full lifecycle reaches every endpoint', function (done) {
const baseUrl = pm.environment.get('baseUrl') || 'http://localhost:8080';
const runId = Date.now();
const reached = [];
function send(name, method, path, token, body) {
const request = {
url: baseUrl + path,
method,
header: [{ key: 'Content-Type', value: 'application/json' }]
if (token) request.header.push({ key: 'Authorization', value: 'Bearer ' + token });
if (body !== undefined) request.body = { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify(body) };
return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
pm.sendRequest(request, (err, res) => {
reached.push(method + ' ' + path);
if (err) return reject(err);
const text = res.text();
if (res.code >= 400) return reject(new Error(name + ' failed with ' + res.code + ': ' + text));
if (!text) return resolve(null);
try { resolve(res.json()); } catch (_) { resolve(text); }
const auth = {
loginAdmin: () => send('login admin', 'POST', '/api/auth/login', null, { email: 'admin@fashionstore.com', password: 'password' }),
register: (suffix) => send('register ' + suffix, 'POST', '/api/auth/register', null, {
firstName: 'Life',
lastName: suffix,
email: 'lifecycle.' + suffix.toLowerCase() + '.' + runId + '@example.com',
phoneNumber: '+3598' + String(runId).slice(-8),
password: 'password'
const body = {
category: (name) => ({ name: name + ' ' + runId, parentId: null }),
color: (name) => ({ name: name + ' ' + runId, value: '#123456', imageUrl: 'https://example.com/' + runId + '.jpg' }),
size: (label) => ({ label: label + String(runId).slice(-4), sizeSystem: 'ALPHA' }),

item: (name, categoryId) => ({ name: name + ' ' + runId, price: 99.99, description: 'Lifecycle item description for API testing.', imageUrl: 'https://example.com/item-' + runId + '.jpg', audience: 'UNISEX', categoryId }),
variant: (itemId, sizeId, colorId) => ({ isActive: true, stockLeft: 12, imageUrl: 'https://example.com/variant-' + runId + '.jpg', itemId, sizeId, colorId }),
address: (line, userId) => ({ country: 'Bulgaria', region: 'Sofia City', city: 'Sofia', postalCode: 1000, addressLine: line + ' ' + runId, userId }),
cart: (variantId, userId, quantity) => ({ quantity, itemVariantId: variantId, userId }),
favorite: (variantId, userId) => ({ itemVariantId: variantId, userId }),
review: (itemId, label) => ({ body: 'Lifecycle review body for ' + label + ' with enough detail.', sizeFit: 'TRUE_TO_SIZE', quality: 'EXCELLENT', comfort: 'VERY_COMFORTABLE', itemId })
(async function run() {
const adminLogin = await auth.loginAdmin();
let adminToken = adminLogin.accessToken;
let adminRefreshToken = adminLogin.refreshToken;
const main = await auth.register('Main');
const mainToken = main.accessToken;
const mainUserId = main.user.id;
const selfDelete = await auth.register('SelfDelete');
const adminDeleteUser = await auth.register('AdminDelete');
const adminBulkUser = await auth.register('AdminBulk');
await send('delete current user', 'DELETE', '/api/users/me', selfDelete.accessToken);
await send('list users', 'GET', '/api/admin/users?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get user', 'GET', '/api/admin/users/' + mainUserId, adminToken);

await send('update user', 'PATCH', '/api/admin/users/' + adminDeleteUser.user.id, adminToken, { firstName: 'Updated', lastName: 'AdminDelete', email: 'updated.admindelete.' + runId + '@example.com', phoneNumber: '+3597' + String(runId).slice(-8), role: 'ADMIN' });
await send('delete user', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/users/' + adminDeleteUser.user.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete users', 'POST', '/api/admin/users/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [adminBulkUser.user.id] });
const categoryMain = await send('create category main', 'POST', '/api/admin/categories', adminToken, body.category('Lifecycle Category'));
const categoryDelete = await send('create category delete', 'POST', '/api/admin/categories', adminToken, body.category('Lifecycle Category Delete'));
const categoryBulk = await send('create category bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/categories', adminToken, body.category('Lifecycle Category Bulk'));
await send('list admin categories', 'GET', '/api/admin/categories?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get admin category', 'GET', '/api/admin/categories/' + categoryMain.id, adminToken);
await send('update category', 'PUT', '/api/admin/categories/' + categoryMain.id, adminToken, body.category('Lifecycle Category Updated'));
await send('delete category', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/categories/' + categoryDelete.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete categories', 'POST', '/api/admin/categories/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [categoryBulk.id] });
const colorMain = await send('create color main', 'POST', '/api/admin/colors', adminToken, body.color('Lifecycle Color'));
const colorDelete = await send('create color delete', 'POST', '/api/admin/colors', adminToken, body.color('Lifecycle Color Delete'));
const colorBulk = await send('create color bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/colors', adminToken, body.color('Lifecycle Color Bulk'));
await send('list admin colors', 'GET', '/api/admin/colors?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get admin color', 'GET', '/api/admin/colors/' + colorMain.id, adminToken);
await send('update color', 'PUT', '/api/admin/colors/' + colorMain.id, adminToken, body.color('Lifecycle Color Updated'));
await send('delete color', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/colors/' + colorDelete.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete colors', 'POST', '/api/admin/colors/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [colorBulk.id] });
const sizeMain = await send('create size main', 'POST', '/api/admin/sizes', adminToken, body.size('LIFE'));
const sizeDelete = await send('create size delete', 'POST', '/api/admin/sizes', adminToken, body.size('DEL'));
const sizeBulk = await send('create size bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/sizes', adminToken, body.size('BLK'));
await send('list admin sizes', 'GET', '/api/admin/sizes?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get admin size', 'GET', '/api/admin/sizes/' + sizeMain.id, adminToken);
await send('update size', 'PUT', '/api/admin/sizes/' + sizeMain.id, adminToken, body.size('UPD'));
await send('delete size', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/sizes/' + sizeDelete.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete sizes', 'POST', '/api/admin/sizes/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [sizeBulk.id] });
const itemMain = await send('create item main', 'POST', '/api/admin/items', adminToken, body.item('Lifecycle Item', categoryMain.id));
const itemDelete = await send('create item delete', 'POST', '/api/admin/items', adminToken, body.item('Lifecycle Item Delete', categoryMain.id));
const itemBulk = await send('create item bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/items', adminToken, body.item('Lifecycle Item Bulk', categoryMain.id));
await send('list admin items', 'GET', '/api/admin/items?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get admin item', 'GET', '/api/admin/items/' + itemMain.id, adminToken);
await send('update item', 'PUT', '/api/admin/items/' + itemMain.id, adminToken, body.item('Lifecycle Item Updated', categoryMain.id));
await send('delete item', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/items/' + itemDelete.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete items', 'POST', '/api/admin/items/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [itemBulk.id] });
const variantMain = await send('create variant main', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants', adminToken, body.variant(itemMain.id, sizeMain.id, colorMain.id));
const variantDelete = await send('create variant delete', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants', adminToken, body.variant(itemMain.id, sizeMain.id, colorMain.id));
const variantBulk = await send('create variant bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants', adminToken, body.variant(itemMain.id, sizeMain.id, colorMain.id));
const variantCartBulk = await send('create variant cart bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants', adminToken, body.variant(itemMain.id, sizeMain.id, colorMain.id));
const variantFavBulk = await send('create variant favorite bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants', adminToken, body.variant(itemMain.id, sizeMain.id, colorMain.id));
await send('list item variants', 'GET', '/api/admin/item-variants?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get item variant', 'GET', '/api/admin/item-variants/' + variantMain.id, adminToken);
await send('update item variant', 'PUT', '/api/admin/item-variants/' + variantMain.id, adminToken, Object.assign(body.variant(itemMain.id, sizeMain.id, colorMain.id), { stockLeft: 20 }));
await send('delete item variant', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/item-variants/' + variantDelete.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete item variants', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [variantBulk.id] });
await send('get current user', 'GET', '/api/users/me', mainToken);

await send('update current user', 'PATCH', '/api/users/me', mainToken, { firstName: 'Lifecycle', lastName: 'Updated', email: main.user.email, phoneNumber: main.user.phoneNumber, currentPassword: 'password', newPassword: 'password' });
const userAddress = await send('create user address', 'POST', '/api/addresses', mainToken, body.address('User Street', mainUserId));
await send('list user addresses', 'GET', '/api/addresses?page=1&size=20', mainToken);
await send('get user address', 'GET', '/api/addresses/' + userAddress.id, mainToken);
const updatedUserAddress = await send('update user address', 'PUT', '/api/addresses/' + userAddress.id, mainToken, body.address('User Street Updated', mainUserId));
await send('delete user address', 'DELETE', '/api/addresses/' + updatedUserAddress.id, mainToken);
const userCart = await send('add cart item', 'POST', '/api/cart/items', mainToken, body.cart(variantMain.id, mainUserId, 1));
await send('list cart', 'GET', '/api/cart?page=1&size=20&search=', mainToken);
await send('update cart item', 'PUT', '/api/cart/items/' + userCart.id, mainToken, body.cart(variantMain.id, mainUserId, 2));
await send('delete cart item', 'DELETE', '/api/cart/items/' + userCart.id, mainToken);
const userFavorite = await send('add favorite', 'POST', '/api/favorites/items', mainToken, body.favorite(variantMain.id, mainUserId));
await send('list favorites', 'GET', '/api/favorites?page=1&size=20&search=', mainToken);
await send('delete favorite by id', 'DELETE', '/api/favorites/' + userFavorite.id, mainToken);
const userReview = await send('create review', 'POST', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id + '/reviews', mainToken, body.review(itemMain.id, 'user review'));
await send('list item reviews', 'GET', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id + '/reviews?page=1&size=20', mainToken);
await send('update review', 'PUT', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id + '/reviews/' + userReview.id, mainToken, body.review(itemMain.id, 'updated user review'));
await send('delete review', 'DELETE', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id + '/reviews/' + userReview.id, mainToken);
await send('filter items', 'GET', '/api/items?page=1&size=20&category=' + encodeURIComponent(categoryMain.name) + '&search=Lifecycle&audience=UNISEX&pricemin=1&pricemax=200', mainToken);
await send('get item', 'GET', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id, mainToken);
await send('list categories', 'GET', '/api/categories?page=1&size=20', mainToken);
await send('get category', 'GET', '/api/categories/' + categoryMain.id, mainToken);
await send('list colors', 'GET', '/api/colors?page=1&size=20', mainToken);
await send('get color', 'GET', '/api/colors/' + colorMain.id, mainToken);
await send('list sizes', 'GET', '/api/sizes?page=1&size=20', mainToken);
await send('get size', 'GET', '/api/sizes/' + sizeMain.id, mainToken);
const adminAddress = await send('create admin address', 'POST', '/api/admin/addresses', adminToken, body.address('Admin Street', mainUserId));
const adminAddressBulk = await send('create admin address bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/addresses', adminToken, body.address('Admin Bulk Street', mainUserId));
await send('list admin addresses', 'GET', '/api/admin/addresses?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('list user admin addresses', 'GET', '/api/admin/users/' + mainUserId + '/addresses?page=1&size=20', adminToken);
await send('get admin address', 'GET', '/api/admin/addresses/' + adminAddress.id, adminToken);
await send('update admin address', 'PUT', '/api/admin/addresses/' + adminAddress.id, adminToken, body.address('Admin Street Updated', mainUserId));
await send('delete admin address', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/addresses/' + adminAddress.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete admin addresses', 'POST', '/api/admin/addresses/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [adminAddressBulk.id] });
const adminCart = await send('create admin cart', 'POST', '/api/admin/cart', adminToken, body.cart(variantCartBulk.id, mainUserId, 1));
const adminCartBulk = await send('create admin cart bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/cart', adminToken, body.cart(variantFavBulk.id, mainUserId, 1));
await send('list admin cart', 'GET', '/api/admin/cart?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('list admin user cart', 'GET', '/api/admin/users/' + mainUserId + '/cart?page=1&size=20', adminToken);
await send('get admin cart item', 'GET', '/api/admin/cart/items/' + adminCart.id, adminToken);
await send('update admin cart item', 'PUT', '/api/admin/cart/items/' + adminCart.id, adminToken, body.cart(variantCartBulk.id, mainUserId, 3));
await send('delete admin cart item', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/cart/items/' + adminCart.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete admin cart items', 'POST', '/api/admin/cart/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [adminCartBulk.id] });
const adminFavorite = await send('create admin favorite', 'POST', '/api/admin/favorites', adminToken, body.favorite(variantFavBulk.id, mainUserId));
const adminFavoriteBulk = await send('create admin favorite bulk', 'POST', '/api/admin/favorites', adminToken, body.favorite(variantCartBulk.id, mainUserId));
await send('list admin favorites', 'GET', '/api/admin/favorites?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('list admin user favorites', 'GET', '/api/admin/users/' + mainUserId + '/favorites?page=1&size=20', adminToken);
await send('get admin favorite', 'GET', '/api/admin/favorites/' + adminFavorite.id, adminToken);
await send('update admin favorite', 'PUT', '/api/admin/favorites/' + adminFavorite.id, adminToken, body.favorite(variantFavBulk.id, mainUserId));
await send('delete admin favorite', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/favorites/' + adminFavorite.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete admin favorites', 'POST', '/api/admin/favorites/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [adminFavoriteBulk.id] });
const adminReview = await send('create review for admin delete', 'POST', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id + '/reviews', mainToken, body.review(itemMain.id, 'admin delete review'));
const adminReviewBulk = await send('create review for admin bulk', 'POST', '/api/items/' + itemMain.id + '/reviews', mainToken, body.review(itemMain.id, 'admin bulk review'));
await send('list admin reviews', 'GET', '/api/admin/reviews?page=1&size=20&search=&filterColumn=&filterValue=', adminToken);
await send('get admin review', 'GET', '/api/admin/reviews/' + adminReview.id, adminToken);
await send('update admin review', 'PUT', '/api/admin/reviews/' + adminReview.id, adminToken, body.review(itemMain.id, 'admin updated review'));
await send('delete admin review', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/reviews/' + adminReview.id, adminToken);
await send('bulk delete admin reviews', 'POST', '/api/admin/reviews/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [adminReviewBulk.id] });
await send('cleanup variants', 'POST', '/api/admin/item-variants/bulk-delete', adminToken, { ids: [variantMain.id, variantCartBulk.id, variantFavBulk.id] });
await send('cleanup item', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/items/' + itemMain.id, adminToken);
await send('cleanup category', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/categories/' + categoryMain.id, adminToken);
await send('cleanup color', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/colors/' + colorMain.id, adminToken);
await send('cleanup size', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/sizes/' + sizeMain.id, adminToken);
await send('cleanup main user', 'DELETE', '/api/admin/users/' + mainUserId, adminToken);
const refreshed = await send('refresh admin token', 'POST', '/api/auth/refresh', null, { refreshToken: adminRefreshToken });
adminToken = refreshed.accessToken;
adminRefreshToken = refreshed.refreshToken;
await send('logout admin', 'POST', '/api/auth/logout', adminToken, { refreshToken: adminRefreshToken });
pm.environment.set('lifecycleRunId', String(runId));
pm.environment.set('lifecycleReachedEndpoints', String(reached.length));
pm.expect(reached.length).to.be.above(80);
})().then(() => done()).catch((error) => done(error));
